name: Hearthside Cheddar Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F.
2. Grease and flour a 9 X 5-inch loaf pan.
3. In a large bowl, combine the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
5. Add the milk, oil, and eggs to the well and stir until thoroughly combined.
6. Gently stir in the chopped apples (ensure they are the cooking type, not sweet eating apples), cheddar cheese, and nuts.
7. Bake for 1 hour and 15 minutes in the preheated oven until the loaf is browned and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
8. Cool in the pan on a rack for 5 minutes.
9. Remove from the pan and cool to room temperature on a wire rack before slicing.
